headline: Monroe Capital Becomes Latest Private Credit Manager To Restrict Withdrawals
summary: Monroe Capital joins other private credit fund managers in capping its redemptions at 5%, as investors sought to redeem approximately 10%.

summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after investors rotated out of AI and chip stocks and into financial names that had lagged during the technology bull run.

headline: Elizabeth Warren Says Private Equity Wants To Profit From AI—And Stick Consumers With The Bill
summary: Warren warned private equity firms could pass AI-driven grid upgrade costs onto consumers through higher power bills.
